requirement_topic.en: Electrical safety of household refrigerating appliances — GS adoption of IEC 60335-1 / IEC 60335-2-24 under GSA conformity assessment
requirement_topic.zh: 家用制冷器具电气安全——GSA合格评定下GS转化的IEC 60335-1/IEC 60335-2-24
requirement_topic.zht: 家用製冷器具電氣安全——GSA合格評定下GS轉化的IEC 60335-1/IEC 60335-2-24

summary.en: Electrical safety of household refrigerators sold in Ghana is assessed against the Ghana Standards （GS） adoptions of IEC 60335-1 （general requirements for household and similar electrical appliances） and IEC 60335-2-24 （particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers）, within GSA's mandatory conformity assessment. Ghana adopts IEC standards as national GS standards, so the technical safety requirements track the IEC 60335 series directly. A critical market-specific parameter is the electrical supply: Ghana's grid is 230 V, 50 Hz. The 50 Hz frequency matches China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V （single-phase） / 380 V （three-phase） system — appliances must be rated and safety-verified at 230 V, and rating-plate, motor/compressor and protective-device suitability at 230 V must be confirmed. Conformity is evidenced through accepted IEC 60335-format test reports plus GSA certification/inspection; there is no acceptance of the CCC mark as a substitute for the GSA safety decision.
summary.zh: 在加纳销售的家用电冰箱的电气安全，依据加纳标准（GS）转化的IEC 60335-1（家用及类似电器的通用要求）与IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具及制冰机的特殊要求），在GSA强制合格评定内评定。加纳将IEC标准转化为国家GS标准，故技术安全要求直接跟随IEC 60335系列。一项关键的市场特定参数是供电：加纳电网为230 V、50 Hz。50 Hz频率与中国相同，但额定电压不同于中国220 V（单相）/380 V（三相）系统——器具须按230 V额定并进行安全核验，须确认铭牌、电机/压缩机及保护器件在230 V下的适配性。合格性通过被接受的IEC 60335格式检测报告加GSA认证/检验证明；CCC标志不被接受为替代GSA安全决定。
summary.zht: 在迦納銷售的家用電冰箱的電氣安全，依據迦納標準（GS）轉化的IEC 60335-1（家用及類似電器的通用要求）與IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具及製冰機的特殊要求），在GSA強制合格評定內評定。迦納將IEC標準轉化為國家GS標準，故技術安全要求直接跟隨IEC 60335系列。一項關鍵的市場特定參數是供電：迦納電網為230 V、50 Hz。50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但額定電壓不同於中國220 V（單相）/380 V（三相）系統——器具須按230 V額定並進行安全核驗，須確認銘牌、電機/壓縮機及保護器件在230 V下的適配性。合格性通過被接受的IEC 60335格式檢測報告加GSA認證/檢驗證明；CCC標誌不被接受為替代GSA安全決定。

standards_or_laws: GS adoption of IEC 60335-1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 1: General requirements
GS adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
Ghana Standards Authority Act, 2022 (Act 1078) — mandatory conformity assessment for electrical safety
Ghana grid supply parameters: 230 V, 50 Hz (nominal)

summary.en: China assesses refrigerator electrical safety under GB 4706.1 （general requirements for household and similar electrical appliances, equivalent to IEC 60335-1） and GB 4706.13 （particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, equivalent to IEC 60335-2-24）, mandatory and verified within the CCC （3C） regime by SAMR/CNCA. Chinese domestic appliances are rated for 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase supply （380 V three-phase where applicable）. Because GB 4706.1/4706.13 are GB adoptions of the same IEC 60335 base standards, the underlying safety construction requirements are closely aligned with Ghana's GS/IEC requirements; the principal substantive difference is the supply voltage （220 V China vs 230 V Ghana） and the conformity-assessment route.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 4706.1（家用及类似电器通用要求，等同IEC 60335-1）与GB 4706.13（制冷器具特殊要求，等同IEC 60335-2-24）评定冰箱电气安全，强制适用并由市场监管总局/认监委（SAMR/CNCA）在CCC（3C）制度内核验。中国国内器具按220 V、50 Hz单相供电额定（适用时380 V三相）。因GB 4706.1/4706.13系同一IEC 60335基础标准的GB转化，底层安全结构要求与加纳GS/IEC要求高度一致；主要实质差异在于供电电压（中国220 V对加纳230 V）及合格评定路径。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 4706.1（家用及類似電器通用要求，等同IEC 60335-1）與GB 4706.13（製冷器具特殊要求，等同IEC 60335-2-24）評定冰箱電氣安全，強制適用並由市場監管總局/認監委（SAMR/CNCA）在CCC（3C）制度內核驗。中國國內器具按220 V、50 Hz單相供電額定（適用時380 V三相）。因GB 4706.1/4706.13系同一IEC 60335基礎標準的GB轉化，底層安全結構要求與迦納GS/IEC要求高度一致；主要實質差異在於供電電壓（中國220 V對迦納230 V）及合格評定路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 1: General requirements (mandatory; equivalent to IEC 60335-1; CCC)
GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (mandatory; equivalent to IEC 60335-2-24; CCC)
CCC (3C) regime administered by SAMR/CNCA; Chinese supply rated 220 V / 380 V, 50 Hz

gap.en: Safety standards are technically close, but a Chinese refrigerator still requires re-evidencing and a voltage check. (1) Conformity route — Ghana requires a GSA safety decision (Certificate of Conformity and/or destination inspection); the CCC mark is not recognised, and GB 4706.13 test reports must be re-packaged against the GS/IEC 60335-2-24 designation through the GSA programme. (2) Voltage rating — China-market units are rated 220 V, whereas Ghana is 230 V; while 230 V is within the typical IEC tolerance band, the rating plate, compressor/motor, thermostat and protective devices must be confirmed suitable and marked for 230 V, 50 Hz operation. (3) Plug/socket and marking — Ghana uses the UK-style Type G 13 A plug; a China Type A/I plug requires change to a compliant Type G plug or cordset, and warning/rating markings must be in English to Ghana's requirements. (4) Edition currency — confirm the GS-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 edition matches the test-report edition.
gap.zh: 安全标准技术上接近，但中国冰箱仍须重新举证并核查电压。（1）合格评定路径——加纳要求GSA安全决定（合格证书及/或到岸检验）；CCC标志不被承认，GB 4706.13检测报告须通过GSA方案、按GS/IEC 60335-2-24编号重新组织。（2）电压额定——面向中国市场的产品按220 V额定，而加纳为230 V；虽230 V处于IEC典型容差带内，但铭牌、压缩机/电机、温控器及保护器件须确认适配并标注230 V、50 Hz运行。（3）插头/插座与标识——加纳使用英式G型13 A插头；中国A/I型插头须更换为合规G型插头或电源线组，警示/额定标识须以英文符合加纳要求。（4）版本时效——确认GS采纳的IEC 60335-2-24版本与检测报告版本一致。
gap.zht: 安全標準技術上接近，但中國冰箱仍須重新舉證並核查電壓。（1）合格評定路徑——迦納要求GSA安全決定（合格證書及/或到岸檢驗）；CCC標誌不被承認，GB 4706.13檢測報告須通過GSA方案、按GS/IEC 60335-2-24編號重新組織。（2）電壓額定——面向中國市場的產品按220 V額定，而迦納為230 V；雖230 V處於IEC典型容差帶內，但銘牌、壓縮機/電機、溫控器及保護器件須確認適配並標註230 V、50 Hz運行。（3）插頭/插座與標識——迦納使用英式G型13 A插頭；中國A/I型插頭須更換為合規G型插頭或電源線組，警示/額定標識須以英文符合迦納要求。（4）版本時效——確認GS採納的IEC 60335-2-24版本與檢測報告版本一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety to GS-adopted IEC 60335-1 / IEC 60335-2-24 assessed within GSA conformity assessment (Certificate of Conformity / destination inspection). CCC mark not accepted. Appliance must be rated/marked for 230 V, 50 Hz and fitted with a Ghana-compliant (Type G) plug.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4706.1 / GB 4706.13 mandatory (CCC) by SAMR/CNCA; Chinese units rated 220 V, 50 Hz

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Refrigerator electrical safety in Ghana is assessed against GS adoptions of IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24 within GSA conformity assessment; the China CCC mark and GB 4706.13 reports are not accepted directly and must be re-packaged against the GS/IEC designation. Critically, Ghana's grid is 230 V, 50 Hz — the 50 Hz matches China but the 220 V China rating must be confirmed/marked for 230 V, and the plug must be changed to the Ghana-compliant Type G. Verify the GS-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 edition before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳冰箱电气安全依据GS转化的IEC 60335-1与IEC 60335-2-24在GSA合格评定内评定；中国CCC标志及GB 4706.13报告不被直接接受，须按GS/IEC编号重新组织。关键在于加纳电网为230 V、50 Hz——50 Hz与中国相同，但中国220 V额定须确认/标注为230 V，且插头须更换为加纳合规G型。提交前须核实GS采纳的IEC 60335-2-24版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 迦納冰箱電氣安全依據GS轉化的IEC 60335-1與IEC 60335-2-24在GSA合格評定內評定；中國CCC標誌及GB 4706.13報告不被直接接受，須按GS/IEC編號重新組織。關鍵在於迦納電網為230 V、50 Hz——50 Hz與中國相同，但中國220 V額定須確認/標註為230 V，且插頭須更換為迦納合規G型。提交前須核實GS採納的IEC 60335-2-24版本。
